hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|css|json)$' && npx --yes prettier --write "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && { errs=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -F "$(basename "$f")" || true); if [ -n "$errs" ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"TypeScript errors in edited file:\n%s"}}' "$(echo "$errs" | head -20 | sed 's/"/\\"/g' | tr '\n' '|' | sed 's/|/\\n/g')"; fi; }; } 2>/dev/null || true
